items.problem: Auto conversation ON sends non-user STT text such as you, Thank you, Beep into translation
items.proposal: Block obvious noise/background STT text and keep Auto ON as one-turn translation flow like OFF

items.problem: Auto conversation ends recording too early because endSilenceMs is too short for human turn taking
items.proposal: Conversation Engine Timing V1: minSpeechMs 200->600, endSilenceMs 420->1200, maxSilenceMs 1400->3000 for auto conversation mode
